overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment at dusk. The scene transitions from a palm-lined sidewalk to an open parking lot surrounded by low-rise commercial buildings and distant futuristic skyscrapers, with neon signs illuminating the warm sunset atmosphere.

concrete overpass crossing the road ahead with stairs visible
illuminated advertisement billboard with colorful display
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady walk along a palm-lined sidewalk at dusk, following a character in a red jacket. The path leads toward a concrete overpass with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background against an orange sunset sky, while a neon billboard glows on the right side.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into an open parking lot, transitioning from the sidewalk to asphalt ground. The character in red continues ahead while parked cars and low-rise commercial buildings come into view on the left, and the palm trees recede into the background.

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the parking lot, the camera approaches a commercial building complex illuminated by red neon signage. Parked cars line the left side in the foreground, while power lines and an overpass ramp become visible ahead against the fading dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a palm-lined urban sidewalk into an expansive parking lot under a fading sunset. It begins by trailing a character in a red jacket along a pedestrian path, moving toward a concrete overpass with futuristic skyscrapers silhouetted against an orange sky. As the character advances, the camera turns right, transitioning from the sidewalk to asphalt as the palm trees recede and low-rise commercial buildings emerge on the left. The scene then opens further into the parking lot, passing rows of parked cars before approaching a building complex illuminated by glowing red neon signage. Finally, the perspective pushes deeper into the lot, revealing power lines and an overpass ramp set against the deepening dusk.
